---
title: "William Barnes"
---

## William Barnes

**Dates:** (fl. 15 March 1852)

### Description

perhaps a neighbour of the Puslinch Yonges.

### Biography

He may possibly also be the Barnes referred to by FMY in 1854 as acting on behalf of WCY in Devon.

### Letters

- Letter from 8th March 1854
- Letter from March 15th [1852[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
